Navigation.quartzDesc: Quartz Stone (90% quartz sand) & Zero Silica Stone (no silica), advanced-made. Wear/stain-resistant; Ideal for kitchen countertops, bathroom vanity tops and wall surfaces.
Navigation.terrazzoDesc: Natural aggregates + eco-adhesive, high-pressure-formed. Large slabs ease install; hard, wear-resistant, non-flammable for indoor and outdoor floors and walls.
Navigation.flexibleDesc: Stone texture + flexibility. Lightweight, easy to install on walls, floors and irregular surfaces. Toxic-free, eco-safe and suitable for modern spaces.
Navigation.marbleDesc: Wayon Marble features unique natural textures and elegant luxury, ideal for hotel lobbies, luxury mansions and high-end commercial interiors.
Navigation.gemDesc: Precision-spliced gem slices, glazed for luster. Luxurious shine and translucency for accent walls and high-end furniture tops.
Navigation.cementDesc: High-strength cement, high-pressure-made. Rich colors, stable structure and indoor or outdoor wall suitability.
Navigation.artificialDesc: Natural mineral powder + eco-friendly binders, high-temp and high-pressure formed. Wear-resistant and versatile for vanity tops, walls and facades.
Navigation.porcelainDesc: Wear-resistant, heat-resistant and eco-safe mineral slabs for walls, malls, hotels and furniture tops.
Navigation.silicaDesc: Silica-free engineered stone that preserves quartz durability while eliminating crystalline silica from the formula.

Hero.subtitle: Creating exceptional spaces with high-quality, durable, and beautiful engineered stone surfaces.

AboutIntro.description: Since 1982, WAYON has been an industry leader in architectural surfacing materials. With 4 major production bases across China, we specialize in high-performance Quartz Stone, Terrazzo, Granite, and innovative Silica-Free surfaces. Our commitment to sustainable manufacturing and cutting-edge technology ensures that every slab meets the highest global standards.

ProductsCarousel.quartzDesc: Highly durable, scratch-resistant engineered surfaces perfect for modern kitchens and commercial spaces, combining natural beauty with advanced performance.
ProductsCarousel.terrazzoDesc: Eco-friendly composite material blending diverse aggregates, offering unlimited design possibilities with exceptional durability for high-traffic areas.
ProductsCarousel.flexibleDesc: Innovative lightweight surfacing material that bends to your imagination, perfect for curved walls, columns, and creative architectural features.

SolutionTabs.kitchenDesc: Elevate your culinary space with our stain-resistant, durable quartz surfaces. Perfect for high-traffic kitchens, offering both stunning aesthetics and practical functionality.
SolutionTabs.bathroomDesc: Create a spa-like retreat with our moisture-resistant, easy-to-clean stone surfaces. Ideal for vanity tops, shower walls, and elegant flooring.
SolutionTabs.commercialDesc: Robust terrazzo and engineered stone designed to withstand the demands of retail spaces, hotels, and office building lobbies without compromising on style.
SolutionTabs.exteriorDesc: Our innovative flexible stone and specialized exterior materials provide durable, beautiful facades that endure the elements while offering unique architectural expressions.

EngineeringCase.project1Desc: Custom terrazzo flooring and quartz displays
EngineeringCase.project2Desc: Marble-effect quartz lobby and bathroom vanities

NewsSection.news1Title: The Future of Sustainable Stone: Silica-Free Innovations
NewsSection.news1Desc: Discover how our new generation of engineered stone is transforming the industry standard for environmental safety.
NewsSection.news2Title: Wayon Unveils New Terrazzo Collection for Commercial Spaces
NewsSection.news2Desc: Our latest terrazzo lines blend traditional craftsmanship with modern eco-friendly materials.
NewsSection.news3Title: Global Expansion: New Showroom Opens in Dubai
NewsSection.news3Desc: Strengthening our presence in the Middle East with a state-of-the-art interactive showroom.

AboutIntro.title:
ABOUT
WAYON STONE
AboutIntro.p1: Wayon Stone, Established in China in 1982, is a global manufacturer of advanced stone materials with 4 major productions and processing bases. Wayon Stone has an annual output exceeding 3 million m² of high-quality quartz, terrazzo, flexible stone, marble, artificial marble, gemstone, sintered stone, cement stone and other natural and artificial stone materials.
AboutIntro.p2: Wayon specializes in producing and processing various types of stone products, including kitchen countertops, bathroom vanity tops, furniture table tops, wall and floor tiles, and custom-engineered stone products.
